title: Shiji: Records of the Grand Historian (Sima Qian), Selection 8
description: From Shiji: Records of the Grand Historian (Sima Qian): chapter 8
introduction: From Shiji: Records of the Grand Historian (Sima Qian): chapter 8

translation.text: From Shiji: Records of the Grand Historian (Sima Qian): A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
